meta.title: Bora Rodar — Your road companion
meta.description: Plan routes, log rides, collect badges and find the motorcycle community.
meta.ogDescription: The companion app for those who live on two wheels.

hero.headline: Your road companion.
hero.subheadline: Plan routes, log rides, collect badges and find the community.

plan.title: Plan Routes
plan.desc: Create day-by-day itineraries with places, lodging and gas stations.

track.title: Track Rides
track.desc: Real-time GPS, accumulated km, fuel consumption and speed.

badges.title: Collect Badges
badges.desc: 54 iconic destination badges + Rota Biker Bronze→Silver→Gold.

maintain.title: Maintain Your Bike
maintain.desc: Checklist, maintenance plan, AI diagnostics and manuals.

events.title: Find Events
events.desc: National calendar with registration, QR tickets and community rescue.

sos.title: Roadside Assistance
sos.desc: Towing, mechanic, community rescue and AI diagnostics.

tracking.title: Track every kilometer.
tracking.desc: Real-time GPS, heat map of your rides, accumulated km, average consumption and speed. Share your routes with the community.

maintenance.title: Keep your bike in shape.
maintenance.desc: Pre-trip checklist, smart maintenance plan, AI diagnostics and manual uploads. Never miss a service again.

community.title: Find your tribe.
community.desc: National events, route groups, local meetups and community rescue system. You never ride alone.

pricing.title: Simple and fair.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits you.

items.name: Lucas M.
items.quote: Finally an app made BY riders, FOR riders. The route tracking is incredible.

items.name: Fernanda R.
items.quote: The badges are addicting! I've already planned 3 trips just to complete the Rota Biker collection.

items.name: Ricardo S.
items.quote: The AI diagnostics saved me on the road. It detected a problem before it became a breakdown.

waitlist.title: Be one of the first.
waitlist.subtitle: Join the waitlist and get 3 months of Pro free at launch.
waitlist.name: Name

footer.copyright: © 2026 Bora Rodar. Made with 🏍️ in Brazil.

about.title: About Bora Rodar
about.content: Bora Rodar was born from a passion for motorcycles and the desire to create the best digital experience for those who live on two wheels. We are a team of riders and developers building the app we always wanted.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.content: Your privacy is important to us. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal data when using Bora Rodar.

terms_page.title: Terms of Use
terms_page.content: By using Bora Rodar, you agree to these terms of use. Please read carefully before continuing.

features_page.title: Features
features_page.subtitle: Everything you need to enjoy every kilometer.

pricing_page.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing_page.subtitle: Choose the plan that matches your riding style.
